mentions.note: Turnaround story: 32% earnings growth, 5.6% SSS beat (vs. 2.4% exp.), raised FY revenue guidance, earnings at high end of forecast. Trades 15x FY earnings, 3.6% dividend yield; cheap entry on home-run quarter despite initial selloff.
New management showing early success; terrific performance 3 months ago likely to repeat; comps reset and old magic returning.
Finally hit after big pre-war rally; consumer weakness showing.
Up 18% YTD; new CEO Fideli off to strong start, stock hung in despite Iran war (expected weakness), proving consumer resilience.

New CEO Fideli's turnaround evident: beat earnings, strong non-merch growth (+25%), $2B strategic investment, acknowledged past mistakes, analyst upgrades to $145 PT. 15x NTM EPS vs. Walmart 44x, Costco 50x; 'way too cheap' if delivery confirmed. Needs SSS positive and margin expansion.
Strong quarter results; one of today's biggest winners up 6.75%; new CEO appointed; retail turnaround story.
New CEO Mike Fideli must act quickly; lacks scale of Amazon, Walmart, Costco; needs rapid reinvention to stay relevant.
Up 4% with new CEO; retail beneficiary of strong ISM manufacturing and institutional rotation into consumer plays.
Renewed enthusiasm with 4% yield and new CEO; part of retail euphoria on inflation softness.
